transcript: Come on, this way! Oh no. Okay, Lena, you've always wanted to be in a street fight. No, I need help. Stay calm. Come on, please. Dan? Look what I found in the garbage. Oh, look at me. I don't have to become a piñata. Okay, I think we lost them good so what exactly were you going to apologize Dan The other way! The other way! Lena, I really do want to say I'm sorry. Sorry for what, exactly? Sorry for acting like such a jerk. Apology accepted. Now get him, Dan! Get him right in his stupid face! Get him! Get him! Get him! Head over to the tea bucket. I didn't sign up for this. If you just made your last wish, we wouldn't... Hold on. This literally could not get any worse. Good one. Thanks! Now eat metal, dirtbags! How do you like them apples, huh? Crap! Incoming! Trust me. Uh, Lena, I think we're gonna have to... Stop! Don't worry, Bats. We got this. Oh, no! Oh, no! I can't do it. You know what, Dad? This is turning into a pretty good date. Oh, no, no, no, no. Oh, no. We're turning into a pretty good date! Thanks for watching!
